sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">PCair.Zen.</title_> = C. C. Edgar, <title_ TEIform="title">Zenon Papyri,</title_> 4 vols. (<title_ TEIform="title">Catal. gén. des Antiq. égypt. du Musée du Caire,</title_> 79) 1925-31: digits indicating 59(000) omitted in refs., thus 2 = 59002.</item>
